data.text: A GREY LOOKING QUARTZ WORLD WITH BRIGHT SPOTS INSTEAD OF THE MORE COMMON
BLACK ONES. A NICE SECTOR HAS BEEN EXPLORED AT 346.68 WITH SPIRES AND
OTHER KIND OF FORMATIONS. 3 PYRAMIDS HAVE BEEN FOUND AT THIS LOCATION AND
MORE PRECISELY AT 3.-4, -45.51 AND -14.-82. (NOTES BY NEUZD, 6011:798.158)
